name: Flat Roof (Azotea)
description: A flat (azotea) roof: a single solid plane covering the building footprint with a 1-block-tall parapet running around the perimeter. Unlike pitched roofs, it does not rise above the AABB — the deck sits at y0 (or one course above the wall top when the input AABB has h > 1). The deck is rendered with @slab for the modern style (thin terrace look) and @roof for medieval / fantasy. A single @secondary scupper block at one corner acts as the drainage outlet, and on footprints ≥ 6×6 a 2×2 hatch is carved into the deck with a @stairs block beside it so the rooftop can be reached from the interior. Suitable for terraces, walkable roof gardens, modern minimalist houses, and tower tops.

required_furniture.rule: Solid plane covering the entire footprint at the deck level (y_roof). Uses @slab for modern style, @roof otherwise.
Perimeter border of @primary, 1 block tall, placed at y_roof + 1 to fence the rooftop.
Single @secondary block at one corner of the deck (default the +x/+z corner) acting as a scupper / drain.
2×2 carved opening in the deck with a single @stairs block beside it; only emitted when W ≥ 6 and D ≥ 6, placed in the quadrant opposite the drain.

placement_rules: Flat roof plane uses slabs for thinness
Deck sits at y0 when AABB.h == 1, or y0 + 1 when AABB.h > 1 (one course above the wall top).
Drain corner is configurable via the drain_corner kwarg ('nw' | 'ne' | 'sw' | 'se'); default is 'se'.
The 2×2 hatch is anchored in the quadrant opposite the drain so the two features never overlap.
lighting_ventilation: Flat roofs are walkable terraces — natural light from the open sky covers the deck; the parapet does not need windows. The drain corner allows rain runoff; the 2×2 hatch ventilates the floor below when used as a roof garden.

medieval.notes: Stone terrace with a rough cobblestone parapet; the drain is a gravel scupper. Common on towers, gatehouses, and Mediterranean-flavoured medieval buildings.

modern.notes: Thin smooth-stone-slab deck with a smooth_quartz parapet for a clean minimalist terrace; the drain reads as a metal scupper.

fantasy.notes: Glowing purpur terrace with a luminous corner scupper; works as the cap of a wizard tower or an Elven balcony.

python_skill_signature: pipeline.skills.flat_roof.build(aabb, materials, style, *, drain_corner='se', hatch=None) -> list[Op]
